classificationDefinitions.serialized/permanent: Stable identifiers persisted in files, artifacts, preferences, or wire formats; change only with an explicit migration.
classificationDefinitions.compatibility: Legacy names accepted or documented so existing packages, paths, commands, integrations, and runtimes continue to work.
classificationDefinitions.historical-attribution: Names retained to preserve copyright, provenance, release history, and the origin of the fork.
classificationDefinitions.migration-pending: Internal names with no intended compatibility promise; reduce them through atomic, tested renames.

entries.reason: The existing repository URL remains valid until a separately authorized hosted-repository rename.
